query: SELECT id, email, cpf, LENGTH(cpf) as cpf_length FROM users WHERE email IN ('simonestetelider@pdi.com', 'usuarioteste4@ckmtalents.net') OR cpf LIKE '%-%' OR cpf LIKE '%.%';
